title: Riviera
writer: Alberto Lattuada, Luigi Malerba, Rodolfo Sonego
actors: Martine Carol, Raf Vallone, Mario Carotenuto
plot: Annamaria, an ex-prostitute, takes her young daughter from convent school with her on a summer vacation. She introduces herself like a widow just to be accepted by people in the Italy of the '50s. She is surrounded by new friends ...
